title: Xbox reaffirms its commitment to exclusives and promises a third exclusive title
summary: Xbox management reinforces its exclusivity strategy, promising more exclusive titles for the console.

title: The Game of Thrones strategy game: War for Westeros delayed until 2027
summary: The development of the RTS based on George R.R. Martin's saga is postponed to ensure the quality of the project.

title: Cinematic prologue of canceled Kingdom Hearts Missing-Link leaked
summary: Leaked images of the canceled prologue show astronauts with Keyblades and generate theories among fans.

title: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' dominates its opening weekend with $124 million
summary: Nolan's 'The Odyssey' exceeds box office expectations while other adaptations of the myth resurface.

title: Cliff Bleszinski acknowledges that his ego and alcohol problems led to Boss Key's failure and plans to return to development
summary: The creator of Gears of War admits past mistakes and considers returning to game development avoiding PvP.

title: The Call of Duty movie will be set in the Modern Warfare universe
summary: The film adaptation of the video game will be tied to the Modern Warfare series.
